summary: Live Merge Guardrail & VP/VWAP Pipeline Audit (Iteration 53) - All 13 backend tests passed. Verified: (1) live_merge metadata exposed in both /api/analyze and /api/v3/signal with keys: status, buffer_age_s, candles_added, buffer_trades, skipped_reason. (2) When feed is connected and buffer age < 60s, live_merge.status='OK'. (3) MQS correctly reflects live_merge status. (4) 60s cache on /api/session-vwaps working. (5) N3 action returns valid values (WAIT/BUY/SELL).
passed_tests: ✅ POST /api/analyze returns live_merge object with keys: status, buffer_age_s, candles_added, buffer_trades, skipped_reason
✅ POST /api/analyze live_merge.status='OK' when feed is connected and buffer age < 60s
✅ POST /api/analyze live_merge.buffer_age_s=2 (< 60s threshold when status is OK)
✅ POST /api/analyze live_merge.candles_added=4 (positive integer when status is OK)
✅ POST /api/analyze session_vps has keys: daily_vp, rth_vp, prev_day_vp
✅ GET /api/v3/signal/MNQ returns data_quality.live_merge with same keys as analyze
✅ GET /api/v3/signal/MNQ data_quality.mqs.ok=True when live_merge.status is OK
✅ GET /api/session-vwaps/MNQ 60s cache working (second call returns identical values)
critical_code_review_comments: Live merge guardrail correctly implemented at lines 5631-5713 in server.py
Freshness check: buffer_age > 60s or ws_disconnected → skip merge, set status to STALE/DISCONNECTED
V3 MQS override at lines 4564-4582: when live_merge is not OK, MQS is forced to fail → N3 freezes
60s cache on /api/session-vwaps correctly implemented at lines 5293-5362
live_merge metadata exposed in both analyze response (line 5800) and v3/signal response (line 4778)
Historical-only fallback serves frontend display only, N3 execution blocked when merge skipped
seed_data_creation: None - tests use live market data from DataBento
context_for_next_testing_agent: Live Merge Guardrail fully tested. Key implementation: (1) LIVE_MERGE_MAX_AGE_S=60 threshold for buffer freshness. (2) live_merge metadata with 5 keys: status, buffer_age_s, candles_added, buffer_trades, skipped_reason. (3) When status is STALE/DISCONNECTED, V3 engine forces MQS failure → N3 freezes. (4) 60s cache on standalone /api/session-vwaps endpoint. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_live_merge_guardrail.py with 13 tests.

feature_verification.POST /api/analyze live_merge: Working - returns status=OK, buffer_age_s=2, candles_added=4, buffer_trades=507
feature_verification.GET /api/v3/signal/MNQ data_quality.live: Working - returns same structure with status=OK
feature_verification.GET /api/v3/signal/MNQ data_quality.mqs: Working - ok=True, score=1.0 when live_merge is OK
feature_verification.GET /api/v3/signal/MNQ nivel_3.action: Working - returns WAIT with valid reason
feature_verification.GET /api/session-vwaps/MNQ: Working - returns globex and session_ny VWAPs
feature_verification.GET /api/session-vwaps/MNQ 60s cache: Working - second call returns identical values
feature_verification.POST /api/analyze session_vps: Working - has daily_vp, rth_vp, prev_day_vp keys

mocked_api_note: SignalStack webhook is MOCKED. All VWAP/VP data is REAL from DataBento live feed.

live_merge_guardrail_verification.mqs_override_behavior: When live_merge.status not in (OK, NO_BUFFER), MQS is forced to fail with reason explaining the stale/disconnected state
live_merge_guardrail_verification.n3_freeze_behavior: When MQS fails due to live_merge guardrail, N3 action is WAIT with reason 'MQS FREEZE: Live merge {status}: {skipped_reason}'
live_merge_guardrail_verification.historical_fallback: Historical-only data serves frontend display, never N3 execution
